string.text:
A customized, built-to-order example of the RD 706 by the American company Rifle Dynamics. RD is known for specializing in high-quality, modernized AK-pattern rifles, known for their precision engineering and enhanced ergonomics. Based in the United States, the company focuses on improving the reliability, accuracy, and modularity of classic designs, making them a top choice for enthusiasts, law enforcement, and professional operators.
 Heavily modified with a mix of Western and Eastern accessories, it is found only among squads of the clandestine ISG.
 
 %c[pda_white]PROPERTIES:
 %c[d_cyan] • %c[pda_white] Origin: %c[ui_gray_2]United States
 %c[d_cyan] • %c[pda_white] Manufacturer: %c[ui_gray_2]Rifle Dynamics

A customized, built-to-order full-length 5.45 AK made by Rifle Dynamics. RD is known for specializing in high-quality, modernized AK-pattern rifles, known for their precision engineering and enhanced ergonomics. Based in the United States, the company focuses on improving the reliability, accuracy, and modularity of classic designs, making them a top choice for enthusiasts, law enforcement, and professional operators.
 Heavily modified with a mix of Western and Eastern accessories, it is found only among squads of the clandestine ISG.
 
 %c[pda_white]PROPERTIES:
 %c[d_cyan] • %c[pda_white] Origin: %c[ui_gray_2]United States
 %c[d_cyan] • %c[pda_white] Manufacturer: %c[ui_gray_2]Rifle Dynamics

A customized, built-to-order example of the 5.45x39 Quickhatch by the American company Rifle Dynamics. RD is known for specializing in high-quality, modernized AK-pattern rifles, known for their precision engineering and enhanced ergonomics. Based in the United States, the company focuses on improving the reliability, accuracy, and modularity of classic designs, making them a top choice for enthusiasts, law enforcement, and professional operators.
 Heavily modified with a mix of Western and Eastern accessories, it is found only among squads of the clandestine ISG.
 
 %c[pda_white]PROPERTIES:
 %c[d_cyan] • %c[pda_white] Origin: %c[ui_gray_2]United States
 %c[d_cyan] • %c[pda_white] Manufacturer: %c[ui_gray_2]Rifle Dynamics

A customized, built-to-order example of the 7.62x39 Quickhatch by the American company Rifle Dynamics. RD is known for specializing in high-quality, modernized AK-pattern rifles, known for their precision engineering and enhanced ergonomics. Based in the United States, the company focuses on improving the reliability, accuracy, and modularity of classic designs, making them a top choice for enthusiasts, law enforcement, and professional operators.
 Heavily modified with a mix of Western and Eastern accessories, it is found only among squads of the clandestine ISG.
 
 %c[pda_white]PROPERTIES:
 %c[d_cyan] • %c[pda_white] Origin: %c[ui_gray_2]United States
 %c[d_cyan] • %c[pda_white] Manufacturer: %c[ui_gray_2]Rifle Dynamics
